query_texts:
SELECT N'id', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([id]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([id]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[sparse_wide]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'a', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([a]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([a]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[sparse_wide]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'b', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([b] COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2) AS NVARCHAR(4000)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([b] COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2) AS NVARCHAR(4000)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[sparse_wide]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'c', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([c]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([c]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[sparse_wide]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'd', ISNULL(CAST(MIN([d]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(CAST(MAX([d]) AS NVARCHAR(200)), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[sparse_wide]
UNION ALL
SELECT N'cs', ISNULL(MIN(CAST(CAST([cs] AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(4000)) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2), N'__NULL__'), ISNULL(MAX(CAST(CAST([cs] AS NVARCHAR(MAX)) AS NVARCHAR(4000)) COLLATE Latin1_General_100_BIN2), N'__NULL__') FROM [dbo].[sparse_wide]
